Jin Fu йќіеЇЊ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Fu (йќіеЇЊ)was born in Zuopingyi. Drove the people into the hills. They only returned when he was defeated by Zheng Hun. Jin Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
